title: Google Search AI Mode starts connecting to third-party apps
friendlyTitle: Google AI Search can now work with some apps
summary: Google is beginning a U.S. rollout that lets people securely link services including Instacart, Canva and YouTube in Search’s AI Mode. The integrations can move a grocery list to a cart, surface design templates or save a playlist without leaving the conversational search flow.
friendlySummary: Google is adding app connections to AI Mode in Search in the U.S. It can help send a grocery list to Instacart, find Canva templates, or save music to YouTube.
whyItMatters: This is a concrete shift from AI answers toward AI-assisted completion of everyday tasks. It also makes account-linking, permission review and knowing where an action will be completed part of ordinary search literacy.
friendlyWhyItMatters: AI search is starting to help finish small tasks, not only answer questions. Check which accounts you connect and what the AI is allowed to do.
